data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. The proposed tests currently encode the same unresolved design issues as the parent/child plans: they assume unknown artifact types only warn instead of reflecting the final validation policy, they test build_prompt_params() against profile.outputs rather than resolved runtime StepMetadata, and they do not cover every built-in prompt path that branches on output semantics (including shipment_review). Please revise the test plan after c8f4 and 0d93 define the canonical target vocabulary and runtime rendering path, then cover canonical targets, legacy normalization, unknown-target behavior, and prompt rendering from resolved step metadata end to end.
